ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "athletic_director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athletic director of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_athletic_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("athletic_director_id") REFERENCES athletic_directors ("athletic_director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the sport */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the sport is played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the team belongs to */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team plays */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., Varsity, Junior Varsity, Freshman) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "roster_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed on the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., practice, game) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule entry */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent for the game (if applicable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the result belongs to */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent for the game */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 10-0) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was played at home or away */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the standing belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletic_directors" (
  "athletic_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athletic director */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athletic director */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athletic director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athletic director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athletic director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athletic_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletic_directors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
